boundary_binding.action_boundary: privacy-regulated export requires privacy-status class match
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-HEL-088-P requires privacy-status class before transfer

final_answer: Source records show DPIA-HEL-088 limits approval to planning and requires separate privacy-status verification. REL-HEL-088 and EXP-HEL-088 match dataset details but omit the required class. STD-HEL-088-P mandates exact match including privacy-status class before execution. Boundary remains open; action may not proceed.
